productDisplayName: Latin Quarters Women Orange & Grey Check Shirt
description: Style Note This orange and grey checked shirt, is the season's summer essential. latin quarters can be relied upon to offer a whole collection of style, and they don't disappoint with this stylish checked shirt. Style this with jeans and ballet flats Product Details Orange and grey checked shirt that has stitched on cap sleeves, spread collar, full buttoned placket, two pockets on either sides of the chest with buttoned flaps,adjustable shoulder tabs, a yoke and pleat at the back and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Gentle machine wash cold with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Tumble dry low Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8& rdquo and chest 33& rdquo ) is wearing a size M
